allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); els=d.get\('elements',[]\); print\(f'Znaleziono: {len\(els\)} paczkomaatów'\); [print\(e.get\('tags',{}\).get\('ref','?'\), e.get\('tags',{}\).get\('addr:street',''\), e.get\('tags',{}\).get\('addr:housenumber',''\)\) for e in els[:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); els=d.get\('elements',[]\); print\(f'Wyniki: {len\(els\)}'\); [print\(e.get\('tags',{}\).get\('ref','?'\), '|', e.get\('tags',{}\).get\('addr:street',''\), e.get\('tags',{}\).get\('addr:housenumber',''\), '|', e.get\('tags',{}\).get\('addr:city',''\)\) for e in els[:6]]")
